Skip to content Overview Quick start Schema architecture Interactive samples Root schema criterion example extends extensions link presentation rich-text status system-info use-cases component foundation guide pattern theme token accessibility anatomy api content design-specifications document-blocks guidelines imports interactions motion principles scale sections states steps variants aliases category extends last-updated links metadata preview since status summary tags thumbnail

Accepts one of:

  • statusValue
  • object — Full status form: overall lifecycle value, optional per-platform readiness, and a conditional deprecation notice. An entity MAY be 'stable' overall while individual platforms are still 'experimental' or 'draft'.
    • Overall lifecycle status of the entity. An editorial judgment of maturity; it need not match the most or least advanced platform status. Tools SHOULD display this as the primary status indicator. Per-platform readiness. Keys are platform identifiers (freeform strings; common values include 'react', 'web-component', 'ios', 'android', 'flutter', 'figma', 'sketch', 'compose'). Values describe the entity's status on that platform. Required when overall status is 'deprecated'. MUST say what to use instead and give a migration path. Tools SHOULD display this prominently next to the status indicator.
References: statusValue, platformStatus [ "stable", { "overall": "stable", "platforms": { "react": { "status": "stable", "since": "1.0.0" }, "android": { "status": "experimental", "since": "3.0.0", "description": "Compose implementation available in preview. API may change before v4." }, "figma": { "status": "stable", "since": "1.0.0" } } }, { "overall": "deprecated", "deprecationNotice": "The legacy Button is deprecated as of 3.0.0. Use Button from @acme/components instead. See the migration guide at https://design.acme.com/migrations/button-v3.", "platforms": { "react": { "status": "deprecated", "since": "3.0.0", "deprecationNotice": "Use Button from @acme/components instead." } } } ]

Design System Documentation Spec (DSDS) 0.7 — Draft Specification

GitHub
